title: 夜色中手持红玫瑰的甜蜜情侣自拍
author: @IqraSaifiii
prompt:
一张竖幅 2:3 比例的浪漫自拍照片，描绘了一对情侣在夜间室内庆祝的场景，前景中拿着一束巨大的鲜艳红玫瑰花束，身后漂浮着闪亮的红心形气球。使用用户上传的图像作为女性和男性的精确面部参考——尽可能紧密地匹配他们的脸型、五官、表情和比例。
女性位于前景，手臂伸向相机正在自拍。逼真的自然皮肤纹理，带有柔和的毛孔和非常细微的瑕疵，光滑但不磨皮，额头、鼻子和脸颊上有来自相机闪光灯的柔和镜面高光。长而直且有光泽的深棕色头发，稍微偏分，平滑地垂在肩上，带有健康的光泽。饱满、轮廓分明的嘴唇涂着大胆的哑光经典红色唇膏，唇线清晰。杏仁状的眼睛有着温暖的棕色虹膜，由长而浓密的睫毛衬托。迷人的晚宴妆容：柔和雕刻的眉毛，完美的中等遮瑕粉底，颧骨上有微妙的修容，温暖的桃红玫瑰色腮红，面部高点有香槟色高光，温暖的棕色眼影带有柔和的烟熏外眼角，清晰的眼线和浓密的睫毛膏。她穿着合身的黑色连衣裙，在最靠近相机的手腕上戴着粗金手镯，稍微失焦。
男子紧靠在她身旁，身体前倾，温柔地微笑着。自然逼真的皮肤纹理，带有轻微的胡茬，可见但整洁。短而浓密的深色头发向上梳理，略带纹理感。中等饱满的嘴唇呈自然色调，表情放松。深邃且富有表现力的眼睛带着温柔的目光，闪光灯下有微小的眼神光。修剪整齐的眉毛。他穿着一件黑色系扣衬衫，顶部扣子稍微解开，休闲而精致。
花束：极其细致的红玫瑰簇，紧密包装，花瓣呈天鹅绒般饱和的深红色，可见丰富的绿叶和茎，花束用优雅的黑色纸张包裹。焦点强烈集中在玫瑰上，细节锐利且对比度高。
灯光和风格：弱光室内环境，强烈的机顶直闪在面部和花朵上产生清晰的高光，微妙地衰减至较暗的背景，营造出抓拍的派对/庆祝氛围。边缘有轻微暗角，高对比度，色彩丰富。背景柔和可见：一侧有玻璃窗，一张铺着白色桌布的桌子，以及多颗漂浮在情侣上方和身后的闪亮红色金属心形气球，反射着闪光。
相机和镜头外观：自拍视角，较近的手臂和手有轻微的广角畸变。模拟现代智能手机前置摄像头，24-26mm 等效广角镜头，f/2 光圈，ISO 400，内置直闪，高分辨率，面部和玫瑰焦点清晰，暗部区域有细微噪点以增加真实感。电影感但自然的色彩分级，逼真的肤色，竖幅 2:3 纵横比。
prompt_en:
A vertical 2:3 romantic selfie photo of a couple celebrating at night, indoors, holding a huge bouquet of vivid red roses in the foreground, with shiny red heart‑shaped balloons floating behind them. Use the user’s uploaded images as the exact facial reference for both the woman and the man – match their face shapes, features, expressions, and proportions as closely as possible.
The woman is in the foreground, arm extended toward the camera as she takes the selfie. Realistic natural skin texture with soft pores and very subtle imperfections, smooth but not airbrushed, gentle specular highlights from the camera flash on forehead, nose, and cheeks. Long, straight, glossy dark brown hair, parted slightly off‑center, falling smoothly over her shoulders with a healthy sheen. Full, defined lips in a bold matte classic red lipstick, crisp lip lines. Almond‑shaped eyes with warm brown irises, framed by long, thick lashes. Glam evening makeup: softly sculpted brows, flawless medium‑coverage foundation, subtle contour on cheekbones, warm peach‑rose blush, champagne highlighter on the high points of her face, warm brown eyeshadow with a soft smoky outer corner, defined eyeliner and voluminous mascara. She wears a fitted black dress and a chunky gold bracelet on her wrist closest to the camera, slightly out of focus.
The man stands close beside her, leaning in, smiling softly. Natural realistic skin texture with light beard stubble, visible but tidy. Short, thick, dark hair styled upward and slightly textured. Medium‑full lips with a natural tone, relaxed expression. Dark, expressive eyes with a gentle gaze, subtle catchlights from the flash. Neatly groomed eyebrows. He wears a black button‑up shirt, top buttons slightly open, casual but polished.
The bouquet: extremely detailed cluster of red roses, tightly packed, petals velvety and saturated crimson, rich green leaves and stems visible, bouquet wrapped in elegant black paper. Strong focus on the roses, sharp detail and contrast.
Lighting and style: low‑light indoor environment with a strong direct on‑camera flash creating crisp highlights on faces and flowers, subtle falloff into a darker background, giving a candid party/celebration vibe. Slight vignetting at the edges, high contrast, rich colors. Background softly visible: glass window to one side, a table with a white tablecloth, and multiple shiny red metallic heart balloons floating above and behind the couple, reflecting the flash.
Camera and lens look: selfie perspective with slight wide‑angle distortion of the closer arm and hand. Simulate a modern smartphone front camera, 24–26mm equivalent wide‑angle lens, f/2, ISO 400, direct built‑in flash, high resolution, sharp focus on faces and roses, subtle noise in darker areas for realism. Cinematic yet natural color grading, realistic skin tones, vertical 2:3 aspect ratio.

title: 杂志风土耳其饺子步骤图解
author: @miilesus
prompt:
超简洁的现代食谱信息图，土耳其饺子是主角菜。
成品：盛于浅陶瓷碗中的饱满手工曼蒂饺子，淋上浓郁的蒜香酸奶和加入红辣椒片的滋滋作响的黄油；撒上切碎的欧芹；热气缓缓升腾；饺子油亮柔软，褶皱清晰；看起来热气腾腾，新鲜出炉。
将食材、烹饪步骤和实用技巧以动态的杂志式布局摆放在碗周围，而不是严格地从上往下排列down.

配料表：
每种食材使用简洁的矢量图标或迷你插图，并标明精确用量（面粉、鸡蛋、牛肉末、洋葱、蒜蓉酸奶、黄油、红辣椒碎）。食材以圆形或流动状组合，在视觉上与菜肴相呼应。

步骤部分：
用编号的方框围绕菜肴展示制作过程：揉面、包馅、包饺子、煮、淋酸奶、黄油酱。使用小图标（擀面杖、刀、锅、炉灶）。
可选信息徽章：
准备时间、烹饪时间、份量、总卡路里以碗附近清晰的玻璃态气泡形式显示。

视觉风格：
杂志级美食摄影与现代信息图设计完美融合。明亮的天然食材色彩，柔和的阴影，简洁的矢量图标，优雅的现代字体，以及微妙的渐变效果。
柔和的自然摄影棚灯光，极简的纹理或渐变背景，营造出高级的编辑质感。

1080×1080，超清晰，无水印，针对社交媒体信息流优化。
prompt_en:
Ultra-clean modern recipe infographic, Turkish Mantı as the hero dish.
Finished dish: plump handmade mantı dumplings in a shallow ceramic bowl, generously topped with creamy garlic yogurt and sizzling butter infused with red pepper flakes; finely chopped parsley sprinkled on top; steam gently rising; dumplings glossy and soft, clearly defined folds; looks hot and freshly served.
Arrange ingredients, cooking steps, and helpful tips around the bowl in a dynamic magazine-style layout, not strictly top-down.

Ingredients section:
Use minimal vector icons or mini-illustrations for each ingredient with exact quantities (flour, egg, minced beef, onion, garlic yogurt, butter, red pepper flakes). Ingredients grouped in circular or flowing clusters visually connected to the dish.

Steps section:
Show the process with numbered panels wrapping around the dish: dough kneading, filling, folding mantı, boiling, yogurt topping, butter sauce. Use small icons (rolling pin, knife, pot, stove).
Optional info badges:
Prep time, cook time, servings, total calories displayed as clean glassmorphism bubbles near the bowl.

Visual style:
Magazine-quality food photography mixed with modern infographic design. Bright natural food colors, soft drop shadows, clean vector icons, elegant modern typography, subtle gradients.
Soft natural studio lighting, minimal textured or gradient background, premium editorial look.

1080×1080, ultra-sharp, no watermark, optimized for social media feed.

title: AI生成主题化人物肖像：西装人物被多手递物环绕，背景幕布呼应
author: Saman | AI
prompt:
```json
{
  "task": "生成一张超真实的摄影棚照片，其构图与参考图像一致：一个身穿燕尾服的成年人居中，许多手从四面八方伸入画面，将物体伸向此人，背景是与主题颜色相符的幕布。",
  "variables": {
    "USER_PHOTO": "<<UPLOAD_OR_URL_TO_USER_FACE_OR_PORTRAIT>>",
    "SUBJECT_THEME": "{\"subject theme\" \"finance\"}",
    "HAND_PROPS": [
      "<<PROP_1 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_2 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_3 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_4 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_5 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_6 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_7 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_8 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>"
    ]
  },
  "prompt": "创建一张超逼真的摄影棚照片（超真实、DSLR 效果），构图和取景与参考图像完全相同：一个成年人居中，正面站立，可见腰部到大腿中部，穿着深蓝色燕尾服夹克、挺括的白衬衫和黑色领结，自信地微笑着。此人戴着圆形眼镜，留着整洁的胡须（小胡子 + 短络腮胡），但脸部必须替换为 USER_PHOTO 中的用户肖像，同时保持自然的皮肤纹理、毛孔和逼真的面部比例（无塑料感皮肤，无卡通化）。灯光是干净专业的摄影棚灯光，带有柔和的阴影，高动态范围，细节清晰。\n\n用 8 到 10 只不同的手和前臂围绕此人，它们从画面边缘（顶部、左侧、右侧、底部）伸入，每只手都拿着一个物体并将其伸向中心人物（靠近脸部/上半身）。这些手属于不同的人（袖子/图案/颜色各异），但要保持真实感和解剖学上的正确性。\n\n重要提示：每次生成时，唯一变化的元素是：(1) USER_PHOTO 中的用户面部，以及 (2) 手中握持的物体。其他一切保持一致：燕尾服姿势、相机角度、镜头效果和整体构图。\n\n物体规则：选择 HAND_PROPS，使其与 SUBJECT_THEME 密切相关。物体必须清晰可见、逼真且多样化（如果合适，可混合现代和复古风格）。按主题分类的示例：\n- 音乐：录音室耳机、麦克风、黑胶唱片、磁带、吉他拨片、小型合成器、节拍器\n- 游戏：控制器、掌上游戏机、游戏耳机、鼠标、键盘、VR 配件\n- 烹饪：厨师温度计、打蛋器、香料研磨器、迷你平底锅、裱花袋、食谱卡\n- 金融：计算器、信用卡读卡器、股票行情打印件、带有金融应用的智能手机、收据卷\n- 健身：智能手表、阻力带、摇摇杯、跳绳手柄\n\n背景：使用幕布背景（如舞台/摄影棚幕布），颜色"
}
```

title: 透明玻璃里的金条
author: @Mystveil7
prompt:
精致的3D等轴测（45°角），采用玻璃拟态与软陶拟态风格。画面中心是[金条]，使用超写实PBR材质渲染，被放置于或半包围在透明玻璃形态内。

风格视觉特征：

材质：主焦点为磨砂玻璃（哑光玻璃），背景高度模糊。元素边缘带有微妙白色内发光，模拟玻璃边缘。

层级：多层构图，界面与图形元素悬浮于不同透明度层级，营造深度感。

几何：完美柔和圆角（Apple风方圆）。

元素细节：

核心物件：精细[金条]，带有精密雕刻，在玻璃表面反射。

界面：漂浮面板呈现"磨砂玻璃"效果（40-60%不透明度），面板上的无衬线字体清晰显示[30.01.2026]数据：价格、趋势箭头与霓虹微图形。

周围：风格化元素（保险柜门、市场图标）由抛光金属与透明塑料混合打造。

技术参数：

光照：柔和演播室灯光、焦散（光线穿过玻璃的反射）、全局照明（GI）。

背景：单调粉蓝色（#B0E0E6），与透明层形成对比。

渲染：Cinema 4D、Octane Render、8K、超精细、纯粹极简。
prompt_en:
Exquisite 3D isometry (45° angle) in the Glassmorphism and Soft Claymorphism styles. The center of the composition is [gold bars], rendered with hyper-realistic PBR materials, which are placed inside or surrounded by translucent glass forms.

Visual characteristics of the style:

Materials: The main focus is on Frosted Glass (matte glass) with a high degree of background blur. The edges of the elements have a subtle white glow (Inner Glow), imitating the edges of glass.

Layers: A multi-layered composition where interface and graphic elements float on different levels of transparency, creating a sense of depth.

Geometry: Perfectly soft, rounded corners (Apple-style squircles).

Detailing of elements:

Central object: A detailed [gold bars] with precision engraving, reflected in the glass surfaces.

Interface: Floating panels with a "matte glass" effect (40-60% opacity). On the panels, clear Sans-serif fonts display data on [30.01.2026]: price, trend arrow, and neon micro-graphics.

Surroundings: Stylized elements (safe doors, icons of the market) made from a combination of polished metal and translucent plastic.

Technical parameters:

Lighting: Soft studio light, caustics (reflections of light passing through glass), global illumination (GI).

Background: A monotone powder-blue (#B0E0E6), creating a contrast with the translucent layers.

Render: Cinema 4D, Octane Render, 8k, ultra-detailed, pure minimalism.

title: 尼斯湖水怪现身古堡前

title: 薯片罐变雪道，迷你滑雪者驰骋雪山
author: Oogie
prompt:
提示词：一个超现实的微型冬季山景。一个巨大的蓝色品客薯片罐倾倒在雪中，薯片洒落出来，形成一条蜿蜒的滑雪板赛道。微型滑雪者沿着弯曲的薯片和雪道平稳滑行，在斜坡上刻出痕迹。背景是白雪皑皑的山脉和晴朗的蓝天。明亮的日光，俏皮的奇幻风格，超逼真的纹理，清晰的雪景细节，浅景深。
主要动作：
微型滑雪者沿着弯曲的赛道，以平滑的弧线向下俯冲，轻柔地刻出痕迹。
次要动作：
松散的薯片碎屑在雪中缓慢翻滚，细小的雪粒在滑雪板后面飞溅，轻微的粉末状雪花在转弯时喷洒。
镜头：
电影般的微距镜头，沿着滑雪板路径缓慢跟踪，低角度靠近雪面，摄像机向前移动时产生轻微的视差，稳定流畅。
风格与灯光：
明亮的自然冬日日光，清晰的对比度，鲜艳的产品色彩，雪上柔和的高光，逼真的阴影，异想天开的商业美学。
限制：
保持品客薯片罐和标志的形状稳定且可读。
滑雪者保持微型且比例协调。
薯片无变形，雪无融化，无物体重复。
负面提示词：
扭曲的标志，不可读的文字，拉伸的罐子，破损的滑雪者，多余的肢体，混乱的动作，晃动的镜头，闪烁，过度运动模糊，故障伪影。
prompt_en:
Prompt: A surreal miniature winter scene in the mountains. A large blue Pringles can lies tipped over in the snow, spilling potato chips that form a winding snowboard track. Tiny snowboarders ride smoothly along the curved chip-and-snow path, carving through the slope. Snow-covered mountains and clear blue sky in the background. Bright daylight, playful fantasy tone, ultra-realistic textures, crisp snow detail, shallow depth of field.
Motion (Primary):
Mini snowboarders glide downhill in smooth arcs, carving gently along the curved track.
Secondary Motion:
Loose chip pieces tumble slowly in the snow, fine snow particles kick up behind the boards, light powder spray follows turns.
Camera:
Cinematic macro shot, slow tracking follow along the snowboard path, low angle close to the snow surface, gentle parallax as the camera moves forward, stable and smooth.
Style & Lighting:
Bright natural winter daylight, clean contrast, vibrant product colors, soft highlights on snow, realistic shadows, whimsical commercial aesthetic.
Constraints:
Keep Pringles can and logo shape stable and readable.
Snowboarders remain miniature and proportional.
No distortion of chips, no melting snow, no object duplication.
Negative Prompt:
warped logo, unreadable text, stretched can, broken snowboarders, extra limbs, chaotic motion, shaky camera, flicker, excessive motion blur, glitch artifacts.

title: 只此青绿宋舞空灵
author: @0x00_Krypt
prompt: 一幅极简广角宋代风格绘画，严格遵循“少即是多”理念。构图以大片纯冷白色宣纸表现无垠虚空。数名宋代女子背身起舞，仅由极淡、极度稀释、湿中湿晕染的冷青玉色与青绿墨色暗示身形与飘逸衣袂，墨色在吸水性纸纹中轻柔晕开，似舞云或流水而非实体。无硬干轮廓或色块。墨色具微妙微晶闪光，如研矿物颜料映环境光。极细发丝宽金属金与柔薰衣草紫线描舞袖与飘带动态边缘。极静、雅动、空灵逸致、冷温。**右下角一方传统中国朱红印，四字“只此青绿”，以典型高度风格化宋代“九叠篆”刻成，笔画繁复回环，几何填满方格。** --ar 9:16
prompt_en: A minimalist wide-angle painting in the Song Dynasty style, adhering strictly to the "less is more" philosophy. The composition is dominated by vast expanses of pure, cold white Xuan paper representing infinite void. A group of multiple Song Dynasty women are depicted dancing, viewed from behind. Their figures and flowing robes are suggested ONLY by swirling, extremely faint, highly diluted, wet-on-wet washes of cold pale jade green and cyan ink that bleed softly into the absorbent paper texture, appearing like dancing clouds or flowing water rather than solid bodies. There are NO hard, dry outlines or solid color blocks. The ink wash possesses a subtle, microscopic crystalline shimmer, like ground mineral pigments catching ambient light. Extremely delicate, hair-thin metallic gold and soft lavender traceries define the dynamic, swirling edges of their long sleeves and ribbons in motion. Immense tranquility, graceful movement, ethereal elegance, cool temperature. **In the bottom right corner, there is a distinct, traditional square Chinese red cinnabar seal (chop). It is meant to be the four characters "只此青绿", carved in the specific highly stylized Song Dynasty "nine-fold seal script" (九叠篆) style, characterized by intricate, winding, folded strokes that geometrically fill the square space.** --ar 9:16

prompt:

背景为芝加哥市中心繁忙的街道，真实的都市生活，车流散景，行人，景深和动感。

服装：嘻哈街头服饰——破洞牛仔裤、露脐上衣/连帽衫、棒球帽、叠戴项链、大耳环、靴子。服装款式可变，但保持相同风格。

每张图片采用不同的拍摄角度和姿势：
• 正面肖像
• 低角度特写
• 侧面轮廓
• 过肩视角
• 全身行走照
• 街头蹲姿
• 高角度抓拍
• 四分之三肖像
• 背面回头照
风格：电影写实主义，浅景深，自然城市光线，细微的胶片颗粒感，时尚杂志风格，所有 9 张图片面部保持一致。
❌ 负面提示词
不同的面孔，面部扭曲，AI 漂移，卡通，CGI，塑料皮肤，文字，水印
🧠 专业提示：
先上传您的面部照片 → 启用面部参考/身份锁定 → 以正方形格式生成，以获得完美的个人资料网格。
prompt_en:
Create a 3×3 grid of cinematic portraits using the uploaded image as the exact face reference (same identity, same facial features, no changes).

Busy downtown Chicago street background, real urban life, traffic bokeh, pedestrians, depth and motion.

Wardrobe: hip-hop streetwear — torn denim jeans, crop tops / hoodies, baseball cap, layered chains, hoop earrings, boots. Outfit variations but same vibe.

Each image uses a different camera angle & pose:
• Front-facing portrait
• Low-angle power shot
• Side profile
• Over-the-shoulder
• Full-body walking shot
• Crouched street pose
• High-angle candid
• Three-quarter portrait
• Back view with head turn
Style: cinematic realism, shallow depth of field, natural city lighting, subtle film grain, fashion-editorial look, consistent face across all 9 images.
❌ NEGATIVE PROMPT
Different faces, face distortion, AI drift, cartoon, CGI, plastic skin, text, watermark
🧠 Pro tip:
Upload your face first → enable face reference / identity lock → generate in square format for a perfect profile grid.

title: 六表情差分角色图，统一造型仅变表情
author: ひいらぎまる
prompt:
根据所附参考图像中的角色，制作一张表情变化表，以单张图片呈现。

格式：
- 2 行 x 3 列网格（6 个大小相同的面板）
- 整体宽高比 3:2
- 背景为纯白色（#FFFFFF）
- 面板边框应纤细且不显眼（浅灰色）
- 在每个面板的左上角放置小数字："1. {argument name="expression 1" default="Neutral"}" "2. Happy" "3. Ecstatic" "4. Sad" "5. Angry" "6. Surprised"（黑色，易于阅读）

共同条件（所有 6 个面板必须完全相同）：
- 发型、发色、眼睛颜色、脸部轮廓、服装、配饰
- 脸部朝向（正面）、半身像角度、头部大小、位置
- 光照、阴影位置、着色（动漫风格的柔和阴影）

只能改变“表情”。不要改变姿势或角度。

排列（固定顺序：从左到右，从上到下）：
1（左上）：中性表情。平静、放松的脸。闭着嘴。
2（中上）：开心。温柔的微笑。柔和的眼神。
3（右上）：狂喜。开怀大笑。嘴巴张开。瞳孔中有强烈的高光，使其闪耀（无需过度效果）。
4（左下）：悲伤。泪眼汪汪。目光低垂。嘴角下撇。
5（中下）：愤怒。眉毛紧锁，眉间有皱纹。牙齿紧咬（或嘴唇紧闭）。
6（右下）：惊讶。眼睛睁大。眉毛上扬。嘴巴张开。

不要包含：
- 背景物体、文字（数字 1-6 除外）、效果线、汗珠、不同服装、不同配饰
prompt_en:
添付の参照画像のキャラクターを元に、表情差分シートを1枚の画像として作成。

フォーマット:
- 2行×3列のグリッド（同じ大きさの6コマ）
- 全体のアスペクト比 3:2
- 背景は完全な白（#FFFFFF）
- コマの境界線は細く控えめに（薄いグレー）でOK
- 各コマ左上に小さく数字「1. 無表情」「2. 嬉しい」「3. 大喜び」「4. 悲しい」「5. 怒り」「6. 驚き」を入れる（黒、読みやすく）

共通条件（6コマすべてで完全に同一）:
- 髪型、髪色、目の色、顔の輪郭、服装、アクセサリー
- 顔の向き（正面）、バストアップの画角、頭の大きさ、位置
- ライティング、影の落ち方、彩色（anime-style soft shading）

変えていいのは「表情」だけ。ポーズや角度は変えない。

配置（左→右、上段→下段の順で固定。入れ替えない）:
1（上段左）: 無表情。落ち着いたリラックス顔。口は閉じる。
2（上段中央）: 嬉しい。穏やかな微笑み。目元は柔らかく。
3（上段右）: 大喜び。満面の笑み。口を開けて笑う。瞳のハイライトが強く入って輝いて見える（過剰なエフェクトは不要）。
4（下段左）: 悲しい。目が潤む。伏し目がち。口角が下がる。
5（下段中央）: 怒り。眉をひそめて眉間にシワ。歯を食いしばる（または唇をきつく結ぶ）。
6（下段右）: 驚き。目を見開く。眉が上がる。口が開く。

不要:
- 背景の小物、文字（数字1〜6以外）、効果線、汗マーク、別衣装、別アクセサリー

prompt:
在一个2x2网格中展示来自世界各地的4种随机不同舞蹈风格，每个格子中都要包含国家和舞蹈名称<instructions>
输入变量：[舞蹈风格]（例如，芭蕾、霹雳舞、探戈）
阶段1：材料与黏度逻辑（AI推理）
选择“身体材料”：选择一种与相关文化有关的液体。
逻辑：如果是芭蕾->白色牛奶/奶油（顺滑、不透明）。
逻辑：如果是弗拉明戈->红葡萄酒/桑格利亚（半透明、鲜艳）。
逻辑：如果是霹雳舞->黑咖啡/可乐（高对比、粗犷）。
选择“强调材料”：一种用于对比的次级液体（如示例中的黄色蛋黄）。
约束：必须是互补色。
阶段2：“流体解剖”构建
姿势：液体凝固在该舞蹈的标志性动作中（例如，阿拉贝斯克、头旋、俯身下腰）。
解剖结构：
躯干：浓稠、有凝聚力的液体（高黏度）。
四肢：当四肢伸展时，液体被拉薄，变得半透明或在手指/脚趾处断裂成液滴。
头部：一个完美的球体液滴或一团凝结的酱汁。
服装/衣物：底部或腰部的“飞溅”充当裙摆或宽松衣物，因离心力而展开。
阶段3：碰撞（装饰点缀）
冲击力：人物从盘子（石板或石头）上的飞溅皇冠中升起。
破碎：次级液体与主液体相遇处，小碎片/液滴飞出，增加动态能量。
输出：1/10000秒快门速度，微距工作室摄影，黑色背景，“液体雕塑”。
</instructions>
prompt_en:
do this for 4 random distinct dance styles from around the world in a 2x2 grid, include country and dance name in each grid
<instructions>
Input Variable: [Dance Style] (e.g., Ballet, Breakdance, Tango)
Phase 1: Material & Viscosity Logic (AI Deduce)
Select the "Body Material": Choose a liquid relevant to the culture.
Logic: If Ballet -> White Milk/Cream (Smooth, opaque).
Logic: If Flamenco -> Red Wine/Sangria (Translucent, vibrant).
Logic: If Breakdance -> Black Coffee/Cola (High contrast, gritty).
Select the "Accent Material": A secondary liquid for contrast (like the yellow yolk in your example).
Constraint: Must be a complementary color.
Phase 2: The "Hydro-Anatomy" Construction
The Pose: The liquid is frozen in a Signature Move of that dance (e.g., An Arabesque, A Headspin, A Dip).
The Anatomy:
The Torso: Thick, cohesive liquid (high viscosity).
The Limbs: As the limbs extend, the liquid stretches thin, becoming translucent or breaking into droplets at the fingers/toes.
The Head: A perfect, spherical droplet or a coalesced blob of sauce.
The Dress/Clothing: The "Splash" at the base or waist acts as the skirt or baggy clothes, fanning out due to centrifugal force.
Phase 3: The Collision (The Garnish)
The Impact: The figure is rising out of a Splash Crown on the plate (Slate or Stone).
The Shatter: Where the secondary liquid meets the primary liquid, small shards/droplets fly off, adding dynamic energy.
Output: 1/10,000th Shutter Speed, Macro Studio Photography, Black Background, "Liquid Sculpture."
</instructions>

> • 背景壮丽：在迷雾般的星尘深处，[天宫_Landmark]的幽灵般、闪烁的轮廓从宇宙云层中升起。**

prompt_en: Transform the original photo into a dramatic, photorealistic, ultra-detailed set of 4 different styles, each a mid close up wide-angle shot with an extreme, dynamic camera angle (including more grid views from directly below or above), where one or more body parts are positioned right next to the lens and appear huge, the rest of the body recedes strongly in perspective, and the same person strikes a stylish, complex, powerful pose in a consistent, expanded version of the original environment, with cinematic lighting, high contrast, crisp textures, and precise color grading.

title: 城市天台日落时尚写真九宫格
author: Harboriis
prompt:
一个 3 × 3 网格的电影风格时尚拼贴画，描绘了一个年轻男子在日落时分的屋顶上，俯瞰着密密麻麻、窗户发光的公寓楼。他穿着叠穿的街头服饰，包括连帽衫、有型的夹克、宽松的裤子和个性运动鞋。金色时刻的光线环绕着他的轮廓，带着温暖的橙色高光和柔和的阴影，景深较浅，纹理逼真，色彩分级干净而富有情绪，DSLR 质量的都市时尚摄影，Instagram 爆款美学，宽幅电影构图，相机角度略低。

顶行：
随意地靠在栏杆上，眺望远方；直立站着，双手插兜，面向镜头；侧身，一只手肘靠在栏杆上，俯瞰城市。

中行：
坐在窗台上，一只膝盖抬起，手臂随意地搭着；背部略微转向，头越过肩膀看向镜头；双手扶着栏杆，身体前倾，凝视日落。

底行：
一只脚踩在低矮的窗台上，整理夹克，向下看；迈着步子缓慢行走，呈现抓拍的动态；上半身特写，直视镜头，表情平静而沉思。

所有九个画面都保持一致的服装、光线、环境和人物身份，高度写实，主体锐利，背景柔和虚化，都市屋顶氛围。
prompt_en:
A 3 × 3 grid cinematic fashion collage of a young man on a rooftop at sunset, overlooking tightly packed apartment buildings with glowing windows. He wears layered streetwear with a hoodie, structured jacket, loose-fit pants, and statement sneakers. Golden hour light wraps around his silhouette with warm orange highlights and soft shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic textures, clean but moody color grading, DSLR-quality urban fashion photography, Instagram-viral aesthetic, wide cinematic framing with a slightly low camera angle.
Top row:
Leaning casually against the railing looking into the distance; standing upright with hands in pockets facing the camera; side profile resting one elbow on the railing looking down at the city.
Middle row:
Sitting on the ledge with one knee raised and arms resting casually; back slightly turned with head over shoulder toward the camera; leaning forward on the railing with both arms looking into the sunset.
Bottom row:
One foot on a low ledge adjusting the jacket looking down; walking slowly mid-step in a candid motion; close-up upper-body shot looking directly into the camera with a calm, thoughtful expression.
Consistent outfit, lighting, environment, and identity across all nine frames, high realism, sharp subject with soft background falloff, urban rooftop mood.

title: 少年跃入漫画救少女

prompt:

title: 超近距离野生动物第一视角摄影
author: TechHalla
prompt:
指令：
生成一张原始、超现实的 POV 野生动物照片，使用运动相机（GoPro 风格）拍摄。

主体（{VAR_SUBJECT}）：
一只 {"subject" "纯净的白色北极狐"}，以极近的距离、近距离拍摄。
姿态：{VAR_SUBJECT} 离镜头极近，好奇地审视着镜头。这会产生标志性的广角面部畸变：一个突出的 {"facial feature" "可爱湿润的黑色鼻子、巨大的毛茸茸耳朵和好奇的胡须"}，巨大的头部比例，以及强烈的眼神接触。
眼睛：{"eyes description" "大而引人注目的金棕色眼睛"}。它们必须清晰地反射出 {VAR_REFLECTION}，传达出野性的智慧。
纹理：皮肤或毛发细节极其高清，呈现出 {VAR_TEXTURE_DETAILS}。

环境（{VAR_BIOME}）：
背景是 {VAR_LOCATION_DESC}。
地形：{VAR_TERRAIN_DETAILS} 之间形成鲜明对比。
氛围：{VAR_ATMOSPHERE}。空气感觉独特而身临其境。由于广角焦距，背景无限延伸。

技术规格（GoPro 风格）：
镜头：16 毫米超广角（鱼眼效果）。
对焦：微距广角。焦点牢牢锁定在主体的眼睛和鼻子上，而远处的地平线则逐渐模糊成柔和、富有氛围感的虚化（景深）。
光照：{VAR_LIGHTING}。柔和、漫射、无影的环境光，能突出主体与地形的对比。
后期处理：RAW 美学。无滤镜，轻微的数字噪点（颗粒），自然的色彩分级，高动态范围以捕捉细节而不过曝高光。

变量（北极狐示例，根据您的需求调整提示）

{VAR_SUBJECT} = 纯净的白色北极狐

{VAR_FACIAL_FEATURE} = 可爱湿润的黑色鼻子、巨大的毛茸茸耳朵和好奇的胡须

{VAR_EYES_DESC} = 大而引人注目的金棕色眼睛

{VAR_REFLECTION} = 无尽的雪域地平线和阴沉的天空

{VAR_TEXTURE_DETAILS} = 极其浓密、多层的白色皮毛，毛发中夹杂着真正的雪花

{VAR_BIOME} = 冰冻的北极苔原

{VAR_LOCATION_DESC} = 广阔的、白雪覆盖的荒野

{VAR_TERRAIN_DETAILS} = 新下的粉雪、突出的锯齿状黑色火山岩和冰块

{VAR_ATMOSPHERE} = 冰冷、清爽、薄雾弥漫

{VAR_LIGHTING} = 蓝色时刻（北欧暮光；日出前柔和、寒冷、漫射的光线）
prompt_en:
DIRECTIVE:
Generate a raw, hyper-realistic POV wildlife photograph shot on an action camera (GoPro style).

SUBJECT ({VAR_SUBJECT}):
A {"subject" "pristine white Arctic Fox"} captured at intimate, point-blank range.
Pose: The {VAR_SUBJECT} is extremely close to the lens, inspecting it curiously. This creates the signature wide-angle facial distortion: a prominent {"facial feature" "cute wet black nose, massive fluffy ears, and curious whiskers"}, massive head proportions, and intense eye contact.
The Eyes: {"eyes description" "Large, striking golden-brown eyes"}. They must feature a sharp reflection of the {VAR_REFLECTION}, conveying wild intelligence.
Texture: The skin or fur details are incredibly high-definition, featuring {VAR_TEXTURE_DETAILS}.

ENVIRONMENT ({VAR_BIOME}):
The backdrop is {VAR_LOCATION_DESC}.
Terrain: Sharp contrast between {VAR_TERRAIN_DETAILS}.
Atmosphere: {VAR_ATMOSPHERE}. The air feels distinct and immersive. The background stretches out endlessly due to the wide focal length.

TECHNICAL SPECS (THE GOPRO LOOK):
Lens: 16mm Ultra-Wide Angle (Fisheye effect).
Focus: Macro Wide. The focus is locked sharply on the subject's eyes and nose, while the distant horizon fades into a soft, atmospheric blur (Depth of Field).
Lighting: {VAR_LIGHTING}. Soft, diffuse, shadowless ambient light that enhances the subject against the terrain.
Post-Processing: RAW aesthetic. No filters, slight digital noise (grain), natural color grading, high dynamic range to capture details without blowing out the highlights.

VARIABLES (Artic Fox example, tweak the prompt to your needs)

{VAR_SUBJECT} = pristine white Arctic Fox

{VAR_FACIAL_FEATURE} = cute wet black nose, massive fluffy ears, and curious whiskers

{VAR_EYES_DESC} = Large, striking golden-brown eyes

{VAR_REFLECTION} = endless snowy horizon and overcast sky

{VAR_TEXTURE_DETAILS} = incredibly dense, multi-layered white fur with actual snowflakes trapped in the coat

{VAR_BIOME} = FROZEN ARCTIC TUNDRA

{VAR_LOCATION_DESC} = a vast, snow-covered wilderness expanse

{VAR_TERRAIN_DETAILS} = fresh powder snow, jagged dark volcanic rocks protruding, and patches of ice

{VAR_ATMOSPHERE} = Freezing, crisp, and misty

{VAR_LIGHTING} = Blue Hour (Nordic twilight; soft, cold, diffuse light before sunrise)

title: 科技创业者埃隆·马斯克的超写实全身肖像与几何风格矢量头像设计

prompt: 超逼真的 8K 全身肖像，描绘的是 [PERSON’S FULL NAME]，他身穿一件干净挺括的白色正装衬衫，领口翻折，佩戴小型翻领麦克风，下身是深海军蓝西裤和擦得锃亮的棕色正装皮鞋。他随意而自然地靠在一面光滑的浅灰色影棚墙壁上；双手插在口袋里，一条腿搭在另一条腿上，肢体语言放松而自信。在他旁边的墙上，添加一幅醒目的黑白矢量肖像，描绘的是他的脸部和半身像——线条和角度锐利，多边形形状相互重叠，呈现出极简主义的现代图形风格，肖像下方是信息：“[PERSON’S FULL NAME]”，姓名下方是：“[{"profession" "PROFESSION"}]”。尺寸为 1080x1080。
prompt_en: Ultra-realistic 8K full body portrait of \[PERSON’S FULL NAME\], wearing a clean and pressed white social shirt with folded collar and a small lapel microphone, dark navy-blue dress pants and polished brown social shoes. Casually and unpretentiously leaning against a smooth light gray studio wall; hands are in pockets and one leg is crossed over the other, with relaxed and confident body language. Add to the wall next to them a prominent vector portrait in black and white of their face and bust - with sharp lines and angles, overlapping polygonal shapes and a minimalist modern graphic style, right below the information: “\[PERSON’S FULL NAME\]”, and below the name: “\[{"profession" "PROFESSION"}\]”. 1080x1080 dimensions.
